title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at RMZ Corp

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at RMZ Corp
jsonLd.description:
RMZ Corp has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RMZ Corp:
RMZ Corp is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp!
